artifacts.title: claude persona forwarded into hulk via agents/claude symlink

bodyMarkdown:
## Vault Location Data

- Place: harnesses/hulk/ (carrier) + substrate/agents/claude/ (persona)
- Substrate path: private/universal/substrate/harnesses/hulk/
- Moment ref: claude-founding-breach-2026-04-08
- Evidence: chronicle entry [3]; founding-breach insight at harnesses/hulk/memory/.docc/insights/founding-breach-2026-04-05.md

## Context

- The founding breach: claude (persona) and hulk (carrier) are recognized as distinct organisms.
- Hulk holds the runtime contract; claude holds the persona. Authoring through the hulk symlink to agents/claude is explicitly forbidden after this point.
- Live Claude Code state migrates to hulk; the legacy harnesses/claude/ home becomes a compat surface.
- This split is load-bearing for every later substrate decision about carriers vs personas.

## Note

This is the most consequential institutional moment in claude's early tenure — it's the doctrine that lets multiple agent personas eventually be hosted on the same carrier.
contextLines: claude (persona) and hulk (carrier) recognized as distinct organisms.
Runtime state migrates to hulk; legacy harnesses/claude/ becomes compat.
Carrier-vs-persona split becomes load-bearing for all later substrate doctrine.
headline: claude → hulk carrier split: persona and carrier become distinct organisms.
role: Persona cargo loaded into the hulk carrier; identity boundary formalized.
summary: The founding-breach migration: claude is recognized as a persona loadable into the hulk carrier, not synonymous with the runtime. Carrier and persona become distinct organisms — a doctrine that becomes load-bearing for every later carrier/persona decision in the substrate.

timeWindow.note: Migration date from chronicle [3]; insight dated 2026-04-05.

title: Founding-breach: claude → hulk carrier split
